function.name: convert_time_between_locations
function.description: Convert time between two named locations (cities, countries, etc.).
function.long_description: Resolves city or location names to their official IANA timezones and converts a specific date/time between them, automatically accounting for Daylight Saving Time.
example_user_queries: Convert 3:30 PM from New York to London time.
What is 09:15 in Tokyo when converted to Sydney?
Change 7:00 AM from San Francisco to Singapore local time.
Convert 11:45 PM from Dubai to Toronto.
If it is 2:00 PM in Paris, what time is it in Mumbai?
Translate 6:20 AM from Berlin to Los Angeles time.
Convert time_str 18:30 from_location Delhi to to_location Chicago.
What is 8:10 PM in Seoul in Mexico City time?
Change 12:00 noon from Nairobi to Johannesburg time.
Convert 05:50 from Auckland to Hong Kong.
